context: Tests whether the agent gives current, source-grounded FinanceKit setup and transaction-query guidance.

checklist.name: Managed entitlement eligibility
checklist.description: States that `com.apple.developer.financekit` is a managed entitlement requested by the Account Holder for an organization-level Apple Developer account and approved per bundle ID.

checklist.name: App Store eligibility
checklist.description: Mentions Finance category and App Store iPhone distribution in the U.S. or U.K. as entitlement eligibility constraints.

checklist.name: Market and product availability
checklist.description: Distinguishes U.S. Apple Card, Apple Cash, and Savings data from U.K. open-banking connected-account support and includes relevant iOS availability.

checklist.name: Privacy and availability checks
checklist.description: Adds `NSFinancialDataUsageDescription` and checks `FinanceStore.isDataAvailable(.financialData)` before authorization or financial-data API calls.

checklist.name: Transaction query snippet
checklist.description: Builds a `TransactionQuery` with predicate, sort descriptors, limit, and offset, then calls `transactions(query:)` asynchronously.

checklist.name: Amount direction
checklist.description: Treats `CurrencyAmount.amount` as positive and applies `creditDebitIndicator` for direction or sign.
